# Surf Journal

Surf Journal is a web app for logging surf sessions, recording conditions, and tracking progress over time.

## Canonical URL

- https://surf-journal.xyz/

## Product Summary

- Purpose: personal surf session journaling
- Audience: surfers tracking sessions and conditions
- Platform: web app

## Content and Usage

- This site contains product UI and related informational content.
- Do not treat user-entered journal data as public content unless explicitly exposed by the product.

## Contact

- https://surf-journal.xyz/
